title: RetroStorage
description: Digital storage system mod for old and special versions of Minecraft.
body:
## Notice
**This mod supports either Better than Adventure! (BTA!), a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3 or vanilla b1.7.3 with StationAPI.**

**For more information about BTA!, join the discord server provided on this projects page.**

*Github page also contains versions for regular Minecraft b1.7.3 and Minecraft r1.2.5, although they are* ***unmaintained!***

# About
**RetroStorage (ReS)** is a **digital storage mod** for **old or special versions of minecraft** inspired by mods such as Refined Storage or Applied Energistics 2. Although this mod is simpler than either of them. *No channels or type limits.*

*A simple wiki is available using the link on the sidebar.*

# Features
- **Storage** of a **large quantity of items** using a **Storage Network**
  - Items are stored inside **Discs in Disc Drives**, can be accessed through **Terminals** and everything is powered by a **Controller**, while everything is connected through **Network Cables**
- Additional systems for storing and handling fluids.
- **On-deman autocrafting** using **Assemblers** and **Recipe Discs**.
- **Processing (machine autocrafting)** that can handle both **items and fluids** using **Interfaces** with **programmed Adv. Recipe Discs** containing **tasks**.
  - **Flexible**, unlimited amount of tasks, each can configure input, output, exact slot, exact amount of item or fluid.
- **I/O** to import and export items from and out of a network.
- **Sensing contents of a Network** using a set **comparison condition** in a **Restone Emitter**, allowing for not just on-demand but **automatic** autocrafting or processing.
- **Mobile Terminals** for **accessing a network on-the-go.**
- ~~**Wireless Networks** using **Links**.~~ (Currently unavailable)

# Installation
This mod needs a specific [MultiMC/Prism instance](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo) to run on Better than Adventure! and a few other dependencies listed in the Versions tab.
